description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a light gray suede and textile upper with prominent stitched paneling and three parallel stripes on the side, characteristic of Adidas design. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for added comfort, with the tongue and heel both displaying the Adidas branding in white. The laces are white and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, threading through reinforced eyelets. The midsole is white and contrasts with the slightly off-white upper, while the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The interior is lined with a darker material, likely for comfort and support, and the overall build suggests a sturdy yet flexible structure suitable for urban environments.
description: A light gray high-top Adidas sneaker with suede and textile panels, white laces, and a padded collar, featuring signature three stripes and branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Adidas three stripes, suede paneling, and white midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel, Adidas logo, and the shoe's overall width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible stripes, lacing, and detailed stitching.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the lacing system, padded tongue with Adidas branding, and toe box shape.
attribute_logo: White 'adidas' text logo on the heel and tongue
